metadata.name: Audit Identity and Access Management (IAM) Program

description: An IT auditor performs a high-level review of the entire IAM program.

nodes.task_description: Verify that a formal IAM policy exists and has been approved by management.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor confirms the existence of an approved policy.

nodes.task_description: Check if a centralized IAM solution is in use, or if access is managed manually for each system.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor finds that access is managed manually and inconsistently across different applications.

nodes.task_description: Recommend the company invest in a centralized IAM solution to improve efficiency and security.

expected_outcome.value: A strategic recommendation is made to improve the overall IAM posture.
